title: Home page loads featured categories and recently added products slider
description: Verifies the home page renders the featured category section and the recently added products slider.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured category cards section" is visible
Verify element "Recently added products slider" is visible

title: Navigate from home slider product card to product detail page
description: Verifies clicking a product card in the home slider opens the product detail page.

steps.description: Verify element "Recently added products slider" is visible
Click on the first visible product card in the recently added products slider
Verify element "Product detail main section" is visible
Verify element "Add to cart" is visible

title: Scroll home slider using Next and Previous controls
description: Verifies the slider navigation controls are usable and the slider updates content.

steps.description: Verify element "Recently added products slider" is visible
Verify element "Slider Next button" is visible
Click on "Next" in the recently added products slider
Verify element "A different product card in the slider" is visible
Click on "Previous" in the recently added products slider
Verify element "A product card in the slider" is visible

title: Navigate from featured category card to category listing page
description: Verifies clicking a featured category card navigates to a category page and shows a product listing.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured category cards section" is visible
Click on the first featured category card
Verify element "Category page product listing" is visible

title: Featured category card CTA link navigates to the same category page
description: Verifies the category card call-to-action link works and reaches the category listing page.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured category cards section" is visible
Click on the "Ver productos" (or equivalent) CTA link within the first featured category card
Verify element "Category page header" is visible
Verify element "Category page product listing" is visible

title: Category page empty state shows 'No products found' after navigating from home
description: Verifies that when a selected category has no products, the empty state message is displayed.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured category cards section" is visible
Click on a featured category card that is expected to have no products
Verify text "No products found" is visible
Verify element "Category page product listing" is not visible

title: Search drawer returns results and navigates to product detail from a result
description: Verifies that searching with 2+ characters shows rich results and clicking a result opens the product detail page.

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Type "ca" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Click on the first product result

title: Search results show image, name, category, and price for an item
description: Verifies each search result presents the expected visible fields (image, name, category, price).

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Type "ca" into the search input field
Verify element "A product result image" is visible
Verify element "A product result name" is visible
Verify element "A product result category" is visible
Verify element "A product result price" is visible

title: Typing only 1 character shows the minimum-characters hint
description: Verifies that the drawer prompts the user to type at least 2 characters when only 1 is entered.

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Type "a" into the search input field
Verify text "Escribe al menos 2 caracteres" is visible
Click on the "X" close button in the search drawer
Verify element "Search drawer" is not visible

title: Closing the search drawer via X hides the drawer UI
description: Verifies the drawer can be dismissed using the close control.

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Click on the "X" close button in the search drawer
Verify element "Search drawer" is not visible

title: Accent-insensitive search returns results for unaccented query
description: Verifies that searching without accents still returns results that may contain accented characters in names/categories.

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Type "cafe" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Verify element "At least one product result" is visible
Click on the first product result

title: No-results state is shown for a query with no matches
description: Verifies that an informative empty state is displayed when no products match the query.

steps.description: Click on the search icon in the header
Type "zzqqlm" into the search input field
Verify element "No results state" is visible

title: Category page shows product list for a category
description: Verifies that a category page loads and displays a visible list of products for the selected category.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)

title: Sorting products by Latest updates the category listing
description: Verifies that selecting the "Latest" sort option changes the visible ordering/contents of the category product list.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)

title: Sorting products by Price (Low to High) keeps results visible
description: Verifies that changing sort to price ascending works without breaking the listing and keeps products visible.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)
Select "Price: Low to High" from the sort dropdown
Verify text "Price: Low to High" is visible

title: Toggle between Grid view and List view on category page
description: Verifies that the user can switch between grid and list layouts and the layout change is visible.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)

title: Pagination: navigate from page 1 to page 2 within a category
description: Verifies that clicking a pagination page number loads a different page of results for the same category.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)

title: Pagination persists after changing sort option
description: Verifies that after navigating to another page, changing sort keeps the user on a valid results page and shows products.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)
Select "Name: A to Z" from the sort dropdown

title: Open a product detail page from a category product card
description: Verifies that clicking a product card in a category navigates to the product detail page and loads product details.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)
Click on the first visible product card in the product list

title: Out-of-range pagination shows empty message or redirects to last page
description: Verifies that selecting a pagination page beyond the available range results in a visible no-results message or redirection to the last available page with products.

steps.description: Click on a visible category link from the home page (for example, a featured category)
Click pagination page number "999" (or the highest available page number if shown)

title: Product detail page: view gallery and open lightbox
description: Verifies a shopper can view the product image gallery and open a full-screen lightbox from the product detail page.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Verify element "Product detail page main product image" is visible
Click on a thumbnail image in the product image gallery
Verify element "Selected gallery image" is visible
Click on the main product image
Verify element "Lightbox full-screen image viewer" is visible

title: Product detail page: navigate gallery using Previous/Next controls
description: Verifies a shopper can move through product images using the gallery Previous/Next controls.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Verify element "Product image gallery" is visible
Click the "Next" button in the product image gallery
Verify element "Selected gallery image" is visible
Click the "Previous" button in the product image gallery
Verify element "Selected gallery image" is visible

title: Product detail page: toggle collapsible informational sections
description: Verifies a shopper can expand and collapse the informational sections (Detalles, Talla, Envío, Grabado).

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Verify element "Detalles section content" is visible
Verify element "Talla section content" is visible

title: Product detail page: add in-stock product to cart and see success feedback
description: Verifies that adding an in-stock product shows visual confirmation that it was added to the cart.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Verify element "Agregar al carrito" is visible
Verify text "Agregado al carrito" is visible
Click on the cart icon/link in the site header

title: Product detail page: out-of-stock product shows 'Sin stock' and blocks add-to-cart
description: Verifies that an out-of-stock product displays the 'Sin stock' state and prevents adding to cart with appropriate UI feedback.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list that is labeled as out of stock
Verify element "Agregar al carrito (disabled)" is visible

title: Product detail page: breadcrumb category link navigates to a category page
description: Verifies breadcrumb navigation is visible and the category link takes the shopper to a category listing page.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Click on the category link in the breadcrumb navigation

title: Product detail page: collapsible 'Grabado' section is accessible before adding to cart
description: Verifies the 'Grabado' informational section can be expanded and its content is visible to the shopper.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Verify element "Grabado section content" is visible
Verify element "Grabado section content" is not visible

title: Product detail page: lightbox can be dismissed
description: Verifies the shopper can close the full-screen image lightbox and return to the product detail page view.

steps.description: Click on a product card from the homepage product list
Click on the main product image
Verify element "Lightbox full-screen image viewer" is visible
Verify element "Lightbox full-screen image viewer" is not visible
Verify element "Product detail page main product image" is visible

title: Proceed from Cart to Checkout after updating quantities
description: Verifies a shopper can adjust item quantity in the cart and proceed to checkout with updated totals shown.

steps.description: Verify element "Continuar con la compra" is visible
Click on the "+" (increase quantity) button for the first cart item
Click on the quantity input for the first cart item
Type "2" into the quantity input for the first cart item

title: Cart shows all required item details and totals summary
description: Verifies cart items display key details (image, name, price, quantity, line total) and a totals section is visible.

steps.description: Verify element "quantity" input is visible for a cart item
Verify element "remove" button is visible for a cart item
Verify text "Continuar con la compra" is visible

title: Directly typing quantity updates totals
description: Verifies the shopper can type a valid quantity and the cart totals section remains visible after the update.

steps.description: Verify element "quantity" input is visible for the first cart item
Click on the quantity input for the first cart item
Type "3" into the quantity input for the first cart item

title: Invalid quantity of 0 is rejected with inline validation
description: Verifies entering quantity 0 is restricted to 1–10 and an inline validation message is shown.

steps.description: Verify element "quantity" input is visible for the first cart item
Click on the quantity input for the first cart item
Type "0" into the quantity input for the first cart item
Verify text "1" is visible in the quantity control for the first cart item

title: Invalid quantity greater than 10 is rejected with inline validation
description: Verifies entering quantity above 10 is restricted to 1–10 and an inline validation message is shown.

steps.description: Verify element "quantity" input is visible for the first cart item
Click on the quantity input for the first cart item
Type "11" into the quantity input for the first cart item
Verify text "10" is visible in the quantity control for the first cart item

title: Remove an item from cart updates the cart contents and totals
description: Verifies a shopper can remove an item and the cart updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the remove button for the first cart item
Verify element "Continuar con la compra" is visible

title: Free shipping banner displays when total is below S/ 299
description: Verifies the cart shows a free shipping banner when the total is below the threshold.

title: Checkout CTA routes to the Checkout page from the Cart
description: Verifies clicking the checkout call-to-action from the cart takes the shopper to the checkout route.

steps.description: Verify element "Continuar con la compra" is visible

title: Checkout page loads and shows key sections (contact, shipping, payment)
description: Verifies the checkout page can be opened and the main form sections are visible before user input.

title: Inline validation shows required field errors when submitting empty checkout form
description: Ensures required field validations are displayed when submitting without completing mandatory fields.

title: Correct validation errors then re-submit (email required + invalid document)
description: Verifies users can fix invalid inputs after seeing validation errors and proceed past client-side validation.

steps.description: Select "DNI" from the document type dropdown
Type "123" into the document number field

title: Ubigeo cascade: selecting Department enables Province selection
description: Verifies the Peru ubigeo cascade progresses from department to province selection.

title: Ubigeo cascade: selecting Province enables District selection
description: Verifies the ubigeo cascade progresses from province to district selection after selecting a department.

title: Shipping method selection toggles between Shalom and Olva Courier
description: Ensures users can change shipping method selection and see the chosen option reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Click on the "Olva Courier" shipping option

title: Switch payment method tabs between Card and Yape
description: Verifies users can switch payment method tabs and see the corresponding payment UI.

title: Submit checkout with Card method shows payment brick and stays on checkout if payment cannot complete
description: Verifies the Card tab displays Mercado Pago payment brick fields and that submission does not navigate to success without completing payment details.

title: Checkout Failure page renders payment failure messaging and next steps
description: Verifies the failure page clearly indicates payment failure and provides user guidance.

steps.description: Verify element "Failure status message" is visible
Verify element "Call to action to try again or return" is visible

title: Checkout Pending page renders payment pending messaging
description: Verifies the pending page indicates payment is pending and user should wait or check later.

steps.description: Verify element "Pending status message" is visible
Verify element "Instructions for next steps" is visible

title: Open Terms of Service page and verify core content renders
description: Verifies the Terms of Service legal page loads and shows expected static content to the user.

title: Navigate from Terms of Service to Privacy Policy using footer link
description: Verifies a user can move between legal pages via footer navigation and the Privacy Policy content renders.

steps.description: Click on the footer link "Política de Privacidad"

title: Open Refund Policy page and verify core content renders
description: Verifies the Refund Policy legal page loads and shows expected static content to the user.

title: Open Privacy Policy page and verify core content renders
description: Verifies the Privacy Policy legal page loads and shows expected static content to the user.

title: Open Complaints Book page and verify core content renders
description: Verifies the Complaints Book legal page loads and displays its informational content.

title: Verify footer exposes links to all legal pages from the home page
description: Verifies the footer provides access to all legal pages and each destination loads when clicked.

steps.description: Click on the footer link "Términos de Servicio"
Click on the footer link "Política de Reembolsos"
Click on the footer link "Libro de Reclamaciones"

title: Legal page content remains readable after scrolling
description: Verifies long-form legal content can be scrolled and the user still sees page content and footer afterward.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Scroll to the top of the page
